embeds.title: God of War Laufey - Gameplay Reveal | State of Play 2026
embeds.description:
The next entry in the iconic God of War series is on the way. 

This time you play as Laufey (or 'Faye'), Kratos' wife and Atreus' mother. Awakening elsewhere after her body is burned, Faye must discover where she is, and how to get back to her family. 

God of War Laufey is currently in development

here's the copy pasta my crew is using for fire gw btw. 
``` I am officially retiring from this Fire Guild War because I refuse to subject myself to the meat mines when a new Grand character with a dangerously smug smile and a totally unfair exposed midriff just completely broke the game. How am I supposed to compete when Mikaboshi is out here doing absolutely stupid amounts of burst damage while looking like a literal goddess in those sexy body? I blew my entire spark fund trying to pull her, and now my grid hits like absolute garbage without her gracefully carrying the entire element on her back. You can call me a slacker, a liability to our Tier A ambitions, or just a pathetic simp with zero crystal reserves, but I am not ruining my sanity mashing F5 for 18 hours against Japanese salarymen while staring at my tragically Mikaboshiless roster. Godspeed to you all and your overpowered Agni setups; I will be on the sidelines, crying over and peacefully collecting my free valor badges while the boss ravages the skies.```
